nasb.text: He sent horses and chariots and a great army there, and they came by night and surrounded the city.

esv.text: So he sent there horses and chariots and a great army, and they came by night and surrounded the city.

cnv.text: 他就差派車馬和一大隊軍兵往那裡去，他們在夜間抵達，圍困那城。

ccb.text: 便派出大队人马和战车前往那里，他们在夜间抵达多坍，把城围住。
